auth.label: Access Token
auth.description: Mezmo access token used with the Authorization: Token header. Create a personal access key or service account access key by following the Mezmo IAM guidance at https://docs.mezmo.com/2.8/docs/authenticating-with-the-api.

actions.name: get_ingestion_status
actions.description: Get whether the Mezmo ingestion service is currently ingesting data for the authenticated account.

inputSchema.description: This action does not require any input parameters.

isIngesting.description: Whether the Mezmo ingestion service is currently ingesting data.

actions.name: get_usage_summary
actions.description: Get the Mezmo usage summary for a required time window without flattening the upstream usage payload.

from.description: Start timestamp for the usage window.

to.description: End timestamp for the usage window.

inputSchema.description: Time range used for Mezmo usage queries.

usage.description: Raw Mezmo usage summary payload after minimal normalization.

outputSchema.description: Usage summary returned by Mezmo for the requested time range.

actions.name: list_app_usages
actions.description: List Mezmo usage entries grouped by app for a required time window and optional result limit.

from.description: Start timestamp for the usage window.

to.description: End timestamp for the usage window.

limit.description: Maximum number of usage entries to return.

inputSchema.description: Time range and optional limit used for Mezmo dimension usage queries.

items.description: One usage entry returned by Mezmo.

outputSchema.description: App usage entries returned by Mezmo.

actions.name: list_host_usages
actions.description: List Mezmo usage entries grouped by host for a required time window and optional result limit.

from.description: Start timestamp for the usage window.

to.description: End timestamp for the usage window.

limit.description: Maximum number of usage entries to return.

inputSchema.description: Time range and optional limit used for Mezmo dimension usage queries.

items.description: One usage entry returned by Mezmo.

outputSchema.description: Host usage entries returned by Mezmo.

actions.name: list_tag_usages
actions.description: List Mezmo usage entries grouped by tag for a required time window and optional result limit.

from.description: Start timestamp for the usage window.

to.description: End timestamp for the usage window.

limit.description: Maximum number of usage entries to return.

inputSchema.description: Time range and optional limit used for Mezmo dimension usage queries.

items.description: One usage entry returned by Mezmo.

outputSchema.description: Tag usage entries returned by Mezmo.
